toggle.autoTagsTab: Open OSM Tags tab by default
toggle.rememberPosition: Restore last map position on startup

legend.title: Legend
legend.clickToFilter: Click to filter by this category

status.sampledTitle: Overview sample — {0} matching signals. Zoom ≥{1} for full detail.

osm.warnSingle: This signal appears to already be in OpenStreetMap. Export anyway?
osm.warnMulti: One or more signals in this group appear to already be in OpenStreetMap. Export anyway?

help.intro: Discover how to navigate the map and find signals using filters, the legend, and available [Controls](#panel:help-control-panel).

finding.title: Finding signals
content: * **Filters:** In the [Filters](#tab-filters) tab, use **Add filter** (e.g., *SignalType*, *Line Code*).
* **Legend:** Click a category to isolate matching signals.
* **Network ID:** Filter by a specific ID, then click the **pill** label to zoom to the signal on the map.

interaction.title: Map interaction
content: * **Controls:** Right-click a signal for the context menu or use keyboard shortcuts.
* **Visibility:** All signals appear at zoom 10+. Below this, a spatial sample is used to maintain readability (active filters still apply).
* **Persistence:** Filters, pinned signals, map position, and settings are saved across sessions.

properties.title: Signal Properties
content: * **Signals:** Infrastructure data. Use the arrows to navigate between co-located signals.
Beside the **Network ID**, click the **OSM logo** for [OpenStreetMap](https://www.openstreetmap.org/) node info, or **Locate on OpenStreetMap** if not yet mapped.

* **OSM Tags:** View, copy, or open tags in the [JOSM editor](https://josm.openstreetmap.de/). Tags follow [OpenRailwayMap — Tagging in France](https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/OpenRailwayMap/Tagging_in_France) specs.
*Note: Experimental feature (specifications are a work in progress).*
The **Pin** button (at the top of the window) keeps a signal for later reference.

mouse.title: Mouse
mouse.clickDesc: Open the signal popup (SNCF data + OSM tags)
mouse.shiftDesc: Open popup on the alternate default tab (see [Settings](#tab-settings) tab)
mouse.ctrlDesc: Pin / unpin the signal; pinned signals appear in the [Filters](#tab-filters) tab
mouse.altDesc: Zoom to and center on the signal
mouse.filterClickDesc: Network ID pill / pinned signal — fly to the signal on the map
mouse.filterShiftDesc: Remove (×) on a pill — close all the other pills

keyboard.title: Keyboard
keyboard.keyContextMenuDesc: Open context menu on focused signal

about.intro: Interactive map viewer for the **SNCF Signalisation Permanente** (Fixed Signaling) open dataset, with [OpenStreetMap](https://www.openstreetmap.org/) integration. Signals can be exported as OSM tags to the clipboard or via [JOSM Remote Control](https://josm.openstreetmap.de/wiki/Help/Preferences/RemoteControl).
